stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P03 A1 省级与重点城市 cohort

value.user_value: A province-portal generic adapter FAMILY: one connector class + declarative site profiles + named override hooks covers A1 provincial governments without copying a business-logic codebase per province. 3 real provincial portals (Jiangsu, Shandong, Beijing) pass across 2 template families; province-specific logic is confined to profiles/hooks (the connector class body has 0 province literals).
value.why_it_matters: A1 (province level) is 31+ provincial governments plus key cities; a per-province codebase would be unmaintainable. The family lets a new province be added as a profile, which is what makes T050 (batch province backfill) tractable.

cost.note: unknown != 0; fixtures were captured from the DEV environment (not the worker) -> 0 cloud cost, DIR-007 unaffected.
cost.human_maintenance: dev-env fixture capture (6 real HTML pages) + family/profile/hook authoring

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (adapter family + profiles + fixtures; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
